text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D, Version 2 │ May 2026 │ V 1.2 9 

BENE_PTB_TRMNTN_CD 

LABEL: Part B Termination Code 

DESCRIPTION: This code specifies the reason Part B entitlement was terminated. 

LONG NAME: BENE_PTB_TRMNTN_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

VALUES: 0 = Not Terminated 
1 = Dead 
2 = Non-Payment of Premium 
3 = Voluntary Withdrawal 
9 = Other Termination 

COMMENT: —
